subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen, from within the Most Great Prison, maketh mention of His loved ones, that all may attain unto supreme sanctity and detachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در سجن اعظم احبای خود را ذکر میفرماید تا جمیع با کمال تقدیس و تنزیه
subcodes.subjects: @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
